dimensions.name: Environmental Knowledge & Advocacy
dimensions.description: Does the answer demonstrate real understanding of environmental issues — climate, biodiversity, pollution, sustainability? Specific facts or frameworks, not vague green sentiment?

dimensions.name: Actionable Solutions
dimensions.description: Does the answer propose concrete, realistic actions? Goes beyond 'raise awareness' to name specific initiatives, policies, or behaviors?

dimensions.name: Directness & Clarity
dimensions.description: Does the first sentence directly answer the question? Is the answer easy to follow?

dimensions.name: Structure & Flow
dimensions.description: Does it follow a logical arc — problem, personal connection, proposed action, close? Smooth transitions?

dimensions.name: Authenticity & Specificity
dimensions.description: Does it sound real and personal, not templated? Uses contestant's actual environmental experiences and platform?

dimensions.name: Community & Local Impact
dimensions.description: Connects global environmental themes to local or community-level action? Shows grassroots understanding?

dimensions.name: Closing Strength
dimensions.description: Last line is memorable and calls to environmental action? Ends with urgency or hope?

dimensions.name: Credibility & Safety
dimensions.description: Environmental claims are factually accurate? No debunked statistics or pseudoscience?
